title: geum sylvaticum
intro: Geum sylvaticum, also known as wood avens, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow or red flowers and yellow or greenish-yellow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum sylvaticum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
